title: Strategy and Operations Manager - Up to $10K - WEST
description:
Job Description

  • Streamline operations and foster a culture of well-being to help teams thrive while achieving high-impact outcomes.

  • Oversee operational tracking, performance monitoring, and reporting of key initiatives to maintain transparency.

  • Manage administrative and logistical tasks to support the smooth functioning of projects and initiatives.

  • Assist in planning, and organizing, and training programs for internal teams for skills development.

  • Develop clear and engaging technical documentation and reports to support team initiatives.

  • Coordinate outreach efforts to enhance internal and external community engagement and strengthen presence.

  • Manage ad hoc projects and special assignments to deliver high-quality outcomes.

  • Lead employee engagement initiatives such as recognition programs, feedback systems, and team-building activities.

Required Work Experience:

  • Bachelor’s degree in Business Administration, Operations Management, or a related field.

  • 3-7 years of experience in operations, strategy, or program management.

  • Strong understanding of business operations and process improvement methodologies.

  • Proven experience in implementing and optimizing processes to drive operational efficiency.

  • Strong organizational skills with attention to detail in tracking, reporting, and documentation.

  • Excellent communication, adaptable to diverse audiences.

  • Skilled in collaboration and relationship-building across teams and stakeholders.

  • Proficient in data analysis, trend identification, and operational improvements.

  • Experienced in event planning and execution, including logistics and engagement.

  • Proficiency in productivity and project management tools (e.g., Microsoft Office, Google Workspace)

  • Familiarity with AI and automation technologies.

This is a 1-year Contract position under People Advantage(Certis Group). We appreciate your application and regret only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

By submitting your resume, you consent to the handling of your personal data in accordance with Certis Group Privacy Policy (www.certisgroup.com/privacy-policy).
